description: All-time month-of-year distribution of passenger-car first registrations. Use when user asks about car-buying season, peak month, or seasonality of registrations.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningFoersteRegistreringDato IS NOT NULL | EVAL reg_month = DATE_EXTRACT("month_of_year", KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningFoersteRegistreringDato) | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY reg_month | SORT reg_month ASC | LIMIT 12
